title: Buffer
intro: The Buffer lets you build a personal buff scheme — a saved list of buffs that can be applied to your character with a single click. No NPC hunting required once your scheme is set up.

figure.alt: Buffer panel showing buff groups and scheme controls
figure.caption: The Buffer panel — buff groups in columns, Apply Scheme and Clean Scheme at the bottom.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
steps: Open the Community Board (`Alt+B`) and select **Buffer** from the left menu.
Browse the buff groups — each column represents a category (combat, support, etc.).
Click the **+** button next to any buff to add it to your saved scheme.
Click **Apply Scheme** to instantly cast all saved buffs on your character.
Your scheme is saved per character and persists between sessions — set it up once and reuse it anytime.

cells: Applies all buffs in your scheme to your character.
Removes all buffs from your saved scheme (does not remove active buffs).

infoBoxes.label: Requirement
infoBoxes.body: Buffer leveling is locked until approximately **150 Rebirths** are completed.

infoBoxes.label: L-Coin
infoBoxes.body: L-Coin drops from regular mobs, raid and world bosses, and seasonal events.
